name: Accomplishment of Fudanshi Bartender
original_name: 腐男子バーテンダーの嗜み
overview: Soichiro Hibiki, a cool Shonan bartender, secretly lives as a fudanshi otaku, dreaming up perfect coupleings among his customers.

trailers.title: Japanese BL "Accomplishment of Fudanshi Bartender" is the embodiment of my guilty pleasure.
